svg.title: Kaido Routes Shuto Route Atlas recognition design
svg.desc: North-up non-navigable design reference. National Land Numerical Information (Highway Time Series, N06-2025), Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism of Japan. Kaido Routes used only current-state records (end year 9999), filtered designated urban expressway features whose route name begins with 首都高速 plus the separately operator-reconciled 高速横浜環状北西線 record, retained complete and provisional-use geometries without vertex simplification, and projected JGD2011 EPSG:6668 coordinates into a north-up local equirectangular normalized display space. The result is geographic context only and has no direction, legal-movement, RoutePlan, or realtime authority.
svg.metadata: National Land Numerical Information (Highway Time Series, N06-2025), Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism of Japan. Modified by Kaido Routes. Source data licensed CC BY 4.0. Display reference only; no navigation authority.

g.title: Current Shuto route-code recognition reference
g.desc: Kaido-owned route-code capsules snapped to matched MLIT context vertices. All twenty-six current operator route names are represented. Yokohama Northwest Route K7 is reconciled to the MLIT source record named 高速横浜環状北西線. This layer is not selectable or navigable.
